candidates.why: Represents debt maturing within one year; best available clean short-term debt/current maturities line from the shortlist.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the current-maturity debt line. Did not include lease-specific rows due to baseline rule excluding leases. Also avoided combining with 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' to prevent possible double counting.

candidates.why: Most likely current tax liability/taxes payable line; appears in current liabilities section and is distinct from deferred tax liability.

variables.notes: Selected a non-shortlist label exactly as written because it clearly matches current tax liabilities and is separate from 'Deferred tax liability'.

candidates.why: Conceptually related to PPE, but values are blank in preview and less directly usable than the reported net machinery/equipment line.
